```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.95em;">

 <div style="background:#F4F2FB;border-left:4px solid #5654A2;border-radius:0 12px 12px 0;padding:0.85em 1em;text-align:left;">
  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">harness · definition</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.5;">
   An orchestrated system of <strong style="color:#5654A2;">specialized agents and tools</strong> that decompose work into phases — each with a different agent persona handling what one model can't do alone.
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.5em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;border-top:3px solid #2C8475;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#3DA18A;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.2em;">layer 01</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;margin-bottom:0.25em;">Agent specialization</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Different jobs, prompts, contexts.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;border-top:3px solid #C4881A;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#C4881A;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.2em;">layer 02</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;margin-bottom:0.25em;">Infrastructure</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Communication, handoffs, tools.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;border-top:3px solid #D45F47;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(212,95,71,0.1);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#D45F47;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.2em;">layer 03</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;margin-bottom:0.25em;">Verification</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">How you check work is done.</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
